channel.title: language-design on Sayak B
channel.description: Recent content in language-design on Sayak B

item.title: struixLang
item.description: A stack-based programming language implemented in Python3. Copyright 2016 Sayak Brahmachari. Licenced under Apache v2.0. Intro: struixLang implements a stack, which is a list of objects which the program operates on. Also, a dictionary is present, containing words (functions/subroutines) which may be executed in a program.* Several primitive (read:built-in) words are pre-defined and mechanisms to define new user-defined words within struixLang itself are in place. For more information see here.
